name: Stitch
summary: Stitch is an AI-powered design experiment that generates user interface layouts and front-end prototypes from prompts.
whyItMatters: Stitch explores how AI can compress the design-to-code pipeline. It points toward a future where interface design, prototyping, and implementation converge into a single AI-assisted workflow.
likelyEvolution: Could mature into a professional design-to-code tool or integrate with developer environments.
